meaning: n.抑郁,沮丧,忧郁布鲁斯歌曲(蓝调音乐)
examples: Can white girls sing the blues?
Rock music came out of the blues.
No one sings the blues like she did.
Langhorne Slim and his band The War Eagles mix folk and blues with reckless punk-rock energy.
Gave him five dollars and went on my way, big city blues in my soul.
